steps.title: Substitute the Fahrenheit temperature and isolate the fraction
steps.content:
Substitute $h = 557.33$ into the conversion formula:
$$557.33 = \frac{9(v-273.15)}{5} + 32$$
Subtract 32 from both sides to isolate the fraction:
$$525.33 = \frac{9(v-273.15)}{5}$$

steps.title: Clear the fraction and solve for the Kelvin offset
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by 5:
$$2626.65 = 9(v-273.15)$$
Divide both sides by 9:
$$291.85 = v - 273.15$$
